plan.preamble:
IMPORTANT project conventions:
- All commands (build, test, lint, run) MUST be executed inside Docker. Use `docker compose run` or `docker compose exec`.
- Do NOT run npm/node commands directly on the host.
plan.postamble: When finished, commit your changes to the current branch.

params.label: Focus Areas

implement.preamble:
IMPORTANT project conventions:
- All commands (build, test, lint, run) MUST be executed inside Docker. Use `docker compose run` or `docker compose exec`.
- Do NOT run npm/node commands directly on the host.
implement.postamble:
When finished:
- Run the full test suite in Docker: `docker compose run --rm test npx vitest run`
- If tests pass, commit your changes to the current branch.

params.label: Verification Focus
